summary: Poor‑quality audience cassette capture of a laid‑back Dark Star → Me & My Uncle → Wharf Rat sequence; the music holds some charm but the audio is far from listenable.
review: The recording is an audience‑sourced tape with noticeable hiss and muffled vocals, making it difficult to follow. Musically the show offers a relaxed Dark Star/Me & My Uncle medley that some listeners find enjoyable, though most reviewers criticize the overall sound quality more than the performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers flag the audio as poor or unlistenable, while only a few note any musical positives; this drives the rating toward low despite occasional praise for the Dark Star segment.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Cassette hiss, muffled vocals, and overall lack of clarity make the tape hard to listen to; no soundboard source available.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set features a laid‑back Dark Star → Me & My Uncle → Dark Star → Wharf Rat sequence that many describe as relaxed and spaced, though the overall flow is not highlighted beyond this medley.

band_member_comments.Keys: Keith (keyboard) fits right in with the laid‑back vibe.
